---
title: "Heterogeneous TNA — Human-AI Interaction Coding"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7, dpi = 150)
```

```{r}
library(htna)
library(cograph)
data(human_long, ai_long, package = "Nestimate")

Net <- build_atna(ai_long, action="code")
splot(Net, layout = "circle")

plot_simplicial(Net, dismantled = TRUE)


```

# Build

```{r}
net <- build_htna(list(Human = human_long, AI = ai_long))
net
```

# Plot

```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=8, dpi=300}

plot_htna(net,  threshold = 0.1, layout="circular", legend = FALSE)

```
